summary: Iteration 24 testing completed: All 19 backend API tests passed (100%), all frontend UI tests passed. Features tested: Backend router extraction (tickets.py, expenses.py, messages.py moved from server.py to dedicated router files), ProspectsPage @dnd-kit migration (no react-beautiful-dnd errors), sidebar RBAC (Settings visible for super_admin only, admin-only pages hidden for employees).

issues: Missing `aria-describedby` warning in console for DialogContent - minor accessibility improvement

endpoints_tested: GET /api/tickets - Admin sees all, employee sees own
PUT /api/tickets/{id} - Admin can update any ticket
GET /api/tickets/stats - Returns total, open, in_progress, resolved counts
GET /api/expenses - Admin sees all, employee sees own
GET /api/expenses/stats - Returns total, pending, approved, by_category, count
GET /api/expenses/application-expenses - Returns bursary and training expenses
GET /api/messages/contactable-users - Admin sees all, employee sees division/subgroup only

prospects_page_dnd_kit.kanban_board: PASS - 6 columns displayed (Identified, Researching, Approached, Engaged, Qualified, Disqualified)
prospects_page_dnd_kit.existing_prospect: PASS - 'Baba Noma' prospect visible in Identified column
prospects_page_dnd_kit.add_prospect_dialog: PASS - Dialog opens with all fields (Name, Email, Phone, Company, Source, Interest Level, Budget Range, Notes)
prospects_page_dnd_kit.react_beautiful_dnd_errors: NONE - No react-beautiful-dnd errors in console
prospects_page_dnd_kit.dnd_kit_migration: PASS - Using @dnd-kit/core for drag and drop

sidebar_rbac.super_admin_sees_settings: PASS - Settings link visible for jane.smith@uct.ac.za (super_admin)
sidebar_rbac.admin_no_settings: PASS - Settings link NOT visible for test.admin@sentech.co.za (admin role only)
sidebar_rbac.admin_sees_admin_pages: PASS - Users, Reports, Expenses, BBBEE visible for admin
sidebar_rbac.employee_tickets_access: PASS - Employee can see Tickets page and New Ticket button

mocked_apis.SMTP_email_notifications: MOCKED - Logs to console instead of sending real emails

seed_data_creation: Test ticket created and deleted during tests (TEST_Iteration24_Employee_Ticket)
context_for_next_testing_agent: All iteration 24 features verified working: 1) Backend router extraction complete - tickets.py, expenses.py, messages.py successfully moved from server.py (~3987 lines reduced to ~3226 lines) to dedicated router files in /app/backend/routers/, 2) All extracted router endpoints working correctly with proper RBAC (admin sees all, employee sees own data), 3) ProspectsPage successfully migrated from react-beautiful-dnd to @dnd-kit - no console errors, kanban board working with drag-and-drop, 4) Sidebar RBAC working correctly - Settings only visible for super_admin, admin-only pages hidden for employees, 5) Prospects page accessible via direct URL /prospects but not in sidebar navigation (may be intentional or needs sidebar link added).
